title: KBC Explorer Catalog
description: Schema for catalog.json used by the KBC Explorer dashboard. Describes the full project ecosystem: metadata, tier assignments, per-project configurations, job statistics, data sharing, and cross-project lineage.

metadata.description: Generation metadata for the catalog snapshot.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the catalog was generated.

tool.description: Name and version of the tool used to generate the catalog (e.g. 'kbagent CLI v0.1.0').

description.description: Human-readable description of the project ecosystem.

tiers.description: Tier definitions grouping projects by their role in the data pipeline (L0 = extraction, L1 = processing, L2 = output).

projects.description: All projects in the ecosystem, keyed by project alias.

lineage.description: Global cross-project data lineage derived from bucket sharing.

edges.description: List of all data sharing edges between projects.

total_edges.description: Total number of data sharing edges.

projects_sharing_out.description: Number of distinct projects that share data outward.

projects_receiving_in.description: Number of distinct projects that receive shared data.

tier.description: A tier groups projects by their role in the data pipeline.

projects.description: List of project aliases assigned to this tier.

project.description: A single Keboola project with its configurations, job stats, and sharing data.

alias.description: Unique project alias as registered in kbagent.

name.description: Human-readable project name from the Keboola platform.

project_id.description: Numeric project ID in the Keboola platform.

sharing_out.description: Buckets this project shares outward to other projects.

sharing_in.description: Buckets this project receives from other projects.

configurations.description: All configurations in a project, grouped by component type.

total_configs.description: Total number of configurations across all component types.

by_type.description: Configurations grouped by component type (extractor, transformation, writer, application, other).

config_type_group.description: A group of configurations belonging to a single component type.

count.description: Number of configurations of this type.

config_id.description: Unique configuration ID within the project.

job_stats.description: Aggregated job execution statistics for a project.

total_jobs.description: Total number of jobs in the sample window.

status_counts.description: Job counts by terminal status (success, error, warning, cancelled, terminated).

success_rate_pct.description: Percentage of jobs that completed successfully.

avg_duration_seconds.description: Average job duration in seconds across all sampled jobs.

date_range.description: Time range of the sampled jobs.

earliest.description: Timestamp of the earliest job in the sample. Null if no jobs exist.

latest.description: Timestamp of the latest job in the sample. Null if no jobs exist.

component_stats.description: Job counts broken down by component, keyed by component_id.

failing_configs.description: Configurations that have experienced errors, sorted by error rate descending.

component_stat.description: Job execution counts for a single component.

other.description: Number of job runs with other terminal statuses (warning, cancelled, terminated).

total.description: Total number of job runs for this component.

failing_config.description: A configuration that has experienced job failures.

error_count.description: Number of failed runs for this configuration.

total_runs.description: Total number of runs for this configuration.

last_run.description: Timestamp of the most recent run.

sharing_out_entry.description: A bucket shared outward from this project to another project.

bucket.description: Source bucket ID in this project (e.g. 'out.c-exchange-rates').

target_project.description: Alias of the target project (may be empty if the target is outside the ecosystem).

target_project_name.description: Human-readable name of the target project.

target_bucket.description: Bucket ID in the target project.

sharing_in_entry.description: A bucket received by this project from another project.

bucket.description: Bucket ID in this project that holds the linked data.

source_project.description: Alias of the source project (may be empty if the source is outside the ecosystem).

source_project_name.description: Human-readable name of the source project.

source_bucket.description: Bucket ID in the source project.

lineage_edge.description: A single data sharing edge between two projects.

source_project_alias.description: Alias of the project sharing data outward (may be empty if outside the ecosystem).

source_project_id.description: Numeric project ID of the source project (as string).

source_project_name.description: Human-readable name of the source project.

source_bucket_id.description: Bucket ID being shared from the source project.

target_project_alias.description: Alias of the project receiving data (may be empty if outside the ecosystem).

target_project_id.description: Numeric project ID of the target project (as string).

target_project_name.description: Human-readable name of the target project.

target_bucket_id.description: Bucket ID in the target project.
